_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: 22:08 UTC tick — 1 level_cross USDJPY 159.45 (cross_UP to 159.453 at 16:37 UTC, sustained break — price now 159.463 bid / 159.475 offer at 22:08 UTC, day high 159.475). SKIP: setup required rejection wick, got clean break-through instead. USD safe-haven bid on Touska seizure + Iran ceasefire expiry T-~1h52m to 0000 GMT Wed Apr 22. MODIFY usdjpy fade level 159.45→160.00 (BoJ/MoF intervention red line — Japan intervened at 159.23 in Jan 2026, Katayama G7 'high urgency' signals). AUDUSD/OIL alerts timing-refreshed T-~1h52m pre-binary (no new prices this tick; last refs 16:14 UTC). 8 queries KEEP. Broker $1000/0 pos matches state.

level_alerts.note: buy AUDUSD near 0.707 support on ceasefire-fail spike — M15 close 0.71617 (91p above, ref 16:14 UTC; no refresh this tick). Binary T-~1h52m to 0000 GMT Wed Apr 22. USD safe-haven bid strengthening (USDJPY pushed through 159.45) — if ceasefire collapses, AUDUSD likely spikes down to 0.707 zone. Wait for rejection candle on 0.707 touch; skip naked level hits.
level_alerts.proximity: 91p above 0.707 buy zone (ref M15 16:14 UTC 0.71617, no refresh this tick). T-~1h52m to 0000 GMT Wed Apr 22 — USD-bid strengthening raises odds of AUD down-spike to zone on ceasefire-fail.

level_alerts.note: sell USDJPY 160.00 intervention red-line fade — 159.45 broke clean up (cross at 16:37 UTC, now 159.463 bid / 159.475 offer at 22:08 UTC, day high 159.475). Prior fade level invalidated by sustained break on Touska/Iran tensions. New level = 160.00 MoF/BoJ red line (Japan intervened at 159.23 in Jan 2026; Katayama G7 'high urgency'). T-~1h52m to 0000 GMT Wed Apr 22 deadline. Short ONLY on rejection wick at 160.00, preferably post-binary resolution; skip naked touches pre-expiry.
level_alerts.proximity: ~52p below 160.00 intervention red line (day high 159.475, bid 159.463). 159.45 fade died — USD pushed through on Touska/Iran tensions. 160.00 armed, T-~1h52m pre-binary expiry.

level_alerts.note: sell OIL 90 fade — 90.003 tagged & rejected earlier (wick-only sweep), M15 close 89.972 at 16:14 UTC (no refresh this tick). Binary T-~1h52m to 0000 GMT Wed Apr 22. USD-bid strengthening (USDJPY +) typically crude-neutral at best. Sell fade on 2nd-test WITH rejection wick is cleaner. FLIP to buy ONLY on SUSTAINED close >90.5 w/ ceasefire-fail headline. M15 bull FVG 88.91-89.548 UNMITIGATED, bullish BOS earlier.
level_alerts.proximity: NEAR-ZONE ref M15 16:14 UTC 89.972 (3p below 90). No refresh this tick. T-~1h52m pre-binary. 90 still armed for 2nd-test sell OR sustained close >90.5 = flip to momentum buy on ceasefire-fail confirm.
